item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Spicy chicken with warm spices, served with baked sweet potato and topped withcreamy avocado and fresh herbs. Red cabbage and orange salad with agave limevinaigrette on the side (2+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Korean bibimbap with seared beef, mushrooms and marinated vegetables, servedwith sushi rice, also available as brown rice, topped with fried egg andtoasted sesame seeds. Kimchi on the side (2+7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Korean bibimbap with sautéed edamame, mushrooms and marinated vegetables,served with sushi rice, topped with fried egg and toasted sesame seeds. Kimchion the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Chicken Danoise, pan roasted chicken with rich jus, served with fried potatoes,classic cucumber salad and rhubarb compote (15) GREEN DISH: dish Salt baked celeriac Danoise with fried potatoes, white beans, cucumber saladand rhubarb compote

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Klassisk gullasch med dyb smag og varme krydderier, langsomt simret som iUngarn (10+13+15) GREEN DISH: ret Ungarsk svampegryde med fylde og varme krydderier, inspireret af det klassiskekøkken

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Pasta alfredo, også som fuldkorn og glutenfri, vendt i cremet parmesansauce medhvidløg og sort peber, serveret med ristet kylling og toppet med frisk zucchiniog fennikelsalat vendt i citrusvinaigrette. Hertil parmesan a part (1+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: ret Pasta alfredo med samme cremede parmesansauce, serveret med ristede grøntsagerog toppet med zucchini og fennikelsalat vendt i citrusvinaigrette. Hertilparmesan a part
